Bob Dylan
February 3 1990 Hammersmith Odeon  London, England  

Lineage unknown

Stuck Inside Of Mobile With The Memphis Blues Again 
Pretty Peggy-O 
Tight Connection To My Heart (Has Anybody Seen My Love) 
Political World 
You're A Big Girl Now 
What Was It You Wanted 
Leopard-Skin Pill-Box Hat 
All Along The Watchtower 
Love Minus Zero - No Limit (acoustic) 
It Ain't Me, Babe (acoustic) (missing)
The Lonesome Death Of Hattie Carroll (acoustic)(missing) 
Gates Of Eden (acoustic) (missing)
Everything Is Broken (missing)
Queen Jane Approximately (missing)
It Takes A Lot To Laugh, It Takes A Train To Cry 
Man In The Long Black Coat 
In The Garden 
Like A Rolling Stone
